name: Firefox Reality (Legacy WebVR)
summary: Allows the user to access outdated WebVR experiences, examples include ANY Webvr experience that wasn't updated during the transition to WebXR (Museum and cultural heritage tours, Experimental indie WebVR worlds, games and art pieces, Academic / research VR demos, Early engine starter kits and framework samples, 2016–2019 A-Frame demo sites and student projects, and more)
